expedition_skills.description: Throws an explosive spear that shatters into numerous fragments, dealing Area Damage equal to 230% of Attack.
Enhance current Basic Attack, dealing Damage equal to 240% of Attack.

on_map_skills.description: Sharp eyes discover hidden resources, increasing both Ingot and Wheat production by 30%.
on_map_skills.upgrade_preview: Wheat Production Speed: 6%/12%/18%/24%/30% | Ingot Production Speed: 6%/12%/18%/24%/30%

on_map_skills.description: Increases Ingot Gathering Speed by 25%, Wheat Gathering Speed by 25%.
on_map_skills.upgrade_preview: Wheat Gather Speed : 5%/10%/15%/20%/25% | Inaot Gather Speed : 5%/10%/15%/20%/25%

expedition_skills.description: Raises the wooden board with both hands and leaps to strike, dealing Area Damage equal to 210% Attack and knocking back enemies.
The primary rule of the West: Always shoot first. Increases Attack Speed by 40% during the first 5 seconds of battle.

on_map_skills.description: A unique lumbering skill that increases Lumber Production by 30%.
A high-speed chopping skill that increases Lumber Gathering Speed by 25%.

expedition_skills.description: Fires special bullet, dealing Damage equal to 500% of Attack.
Basic Attack has a 30% chance to stun enemies for 1 second.

on_map_skills.description: Sharp insight can discover hidden silver veins in the desert to increase Silver Production by 30%.
Increases Silver Gathering Speed by 25%.

expedition_skills.description: Holds the mining pick with both hands and spins in place 6 times, each spin dealing Area Damage equal to 50% of Attack to surrounding enemies.
Enhances the Damage of the 'Pickaxe Cyclone’ skill, each spin dealing additional Damage equal to 20% of Defense.

on_map_skills.description: A pioneer who traverses canyons and rocky terrains, increases Rock Production by 30%.
With arms tempered through countless strikes, increases Rock gathering speed by 25%.

expedition_skills.description: Sprays powerful flames, dealing Damage equal to 48% of Attack every 0.3 seconds, lasting for 4 seconds
Takes a big drink of liquor, restores 10% Health, and increases Defense by 30% for 5 seconds.
Increases Health by 20% after entering battle.

on_map_skills.description: A tough man with skin as rough as sandpaper, reduces Troop Damage taken by 20%.
Unleashes a fire-breathing skill that makes outlaws retreat, reducing enemy Attack by 20%.

expedition_skills.description: Takes aim before firing, dealing 400% Damage and stunning the target for 1.5 seconds.
Fires both revolvers simultaneously twice, dealing Damage by 180% of Attack and reducing the target's Defense by 30% for 2 seconds.
Fearless of injury, only seeking to take down more enemies before falling. Reduces Defense by 10% and increases Attack by 30%.

on_map_skills.description: Dodging skill perfected in bar duels lowers Troop Damage taken by 20%.
A masterful skill of alternating shots with both hands, has a 50% chance to increase Troop Damage dealt by 40%.

expedition_skills.description: Hurls poisoned daggers, dealing 150% Damage, and poisons enemies for 3 seconds.
Increases Attack by 20%, fires venomous darts dealing 200% Damage, and reduces the target's healing received by 50% for 3 seconds.
expedition_skills.upgrade_preview: Attack Reduction: 4%/8%/12%/16%/20% | Damage Rate: 100%/120%/140%/160%/200% | Received Healing Reduction: 10%/20%/30%/40%/50%

expedition_skills.description: Grants 40% chance to instantly recast "Viper's Darts" after activation.

on_map_skills.description: Increases Troop Damage dealt by 20%, with an additional increase of 5% when rallying for attack or defense.
on_map_skills.upgrade_preview: Damage Dealt: 4%/8%/12%/16%/20% | Rally Troop DMG Dealt Enhancement: 1%/2%/3%/4%/5%

on_map_skills.description: Increases Research Speed by 15%.

expedition_skills.description: Heals friendly units around by 120% of Attack, and increases Defense by 20%, lasting for 4 seconds.
Heal the friendly Hero with the lowest Health percentage for 200% of the Attack.
Basic Attack has a 25% chance to restore 15% Health.

on_map_skills.description: Reduces Troop Damage taken by 20%, with an additional reduction of 5% when rallying for attack or defense.
on_map_skills.upgrade_preview: Received Damage Reduction: 4%/8%/12%/16%/20% | Rally Troop DMG Received Reduction Enhancement: 1%/2%/3%/4%/5%

on_map_skills.description: Increases Troop Attack by 20%.

expedition_skills.description: Throws a grenade, dealing 200% Attack as Area Damage and inflicting Bleeding. Bleeding deals 20% Attack as Damage and increases target's Damage taken by 30% for 2 seconds.
Basic Attack has a 10% chance to immediately trigger "Special Grenade".
Restores 30% of max Health when falling below 50% Health. Triggers once per battle.

on_map_skills.description: Increases Troop Damage dealt by 20%, with an additional increase of 5% when rallying for attack or defense.
on_map_skills.upgrade_preview: Damage Dealt: 4%/8%/12%/16%/20% | Rally Troop DMG Dealt Enhancement: 1%/2%/3%/4%/5%

on_map_skills.description: Reduces Troop Damage taken by 20%.

expedition_skills.description: Quickly disengages your rifle and fire, dealing Area Damage to nearby targets by 300% of Attack and destroying their shields.
A special substance mixed in bullets that, upon hitting enemies, deals Damage equal to 250% of Attack and reduces enemy Attack Speed by 3% for 2 seconds.
When Health is above 50%, increases Attack by 20%.

on_map_skills.description: Reduces enemy Attack by 20%.
Reduces Training Resource Cost by 10%, increases Training Speed by 20%.

expedition_skills.description: Prays to increase the Attack of all allied Heroes and Aide by 5% and Attack Speed by 10%, lasting for 4 seconds.
Throws holy water, dealing Area Damage equal to 210% of Attack.
While "Hallowed Hoot" is active, all allied Heroes recover Health equal to 15% of Attack every second.

on_map_skills.description: Reduces enemy Attack by 20%.
Increases Troop March Speed against Beasts/Daly's Caravans/Daly's Camp in on-map battles by 100%.

expedition_skills.description: Lights up the arrow and shoots three explosive shots, dealing Damage to the target by 180% of Attack, dealing Damage to the areas nearby the target by 60% of Attack.
Basic Attack has a 25% chance to increase the Attack Speed by 15% for 5 seconds. The effect stacks.
Increases Attack by 10%.

on_map_skills.description: Increases Troop Attack by 20%, with an additional increase of 5% when rallying for attack or defense.
on_map_skills.upgrade_preview: Troop Attack Enhancement: 4%/8%/12%/16%/20% | Rally Troop Attack Enhancement: 1%/2%/3%/4%/5%

on_map_skills.description: A self-taught prairie first aid skill, increases Troop Healing Speed by 40%.

expedition_skills.description: Throws a bottle and shoots it mid-air, creating a fireball that deals Area Damage equal to 300% of Attack.
Takes a small sip of whiskey, increasing critical hit rate by 30% for 5 seconds.
Increases Attack Speed by 20% for 5 seconds.

on_map_skills.description: Well-versed in wilderness survival skills, reduces Troop Stamina Cost in on-map battle against Beasts/Daly's Caravan by 20%.
His beer-fueled marathon secrets increase Troop March Speed against Beasts/Daly's Caravans in on-map battle by 100%.

expedition_skills.description: Marks the enemy with the highest Attack and lowest Defense, firing 8 rounds that deal 1280% total Damage.
Each Attack stacks, reducing enemy Defense by 5% for the battle.
Basic Attacks have 50% chance to reduce cooldown of Skill Judgment Call by 40%.

on_map_skills.description: Forms a defensive wagon ring for cover. Has an 80% chance to reduce Damage taken by 30%.
Precise rifle shots pin down enemies. Has a 50% chance to reduce enemy Attack by 50%.
Targets enemy weak points with deadly precision. Has a 50% chance to increase Damage by 50%.

expedition_skills.description: Switches to lead bullets, dealing Area Damage equal to 160% of Attack to enemies in front and stunning them for 1 second.
Releases sword energy on Basic Attack, dealing Damage equal to 24% of Attack to enemies in front.
Upon taking Damage, 10% chance to reduce Damage taken by 10% and increase Damage dealt by 10% for 3 seconds. The effect stacks.

on_map_skills.description: A legendary commander of the Western war, increases Troop Damage dealt by 25%.
Increases Troop Attack by 25%.
Master of defensive tactics, reduces Damage taken by Troop by 25%.

expedition_skills.description: Plays guitar, boosting nearby allies' Attack Speed by 50% and gaining 80% shield per second for 3 seconds.
expedition_skills.upgrade_preview: Attack Speed : 10%/20%/30%/40%/50% | Shield Coefficient: 16%/32%/48%/64%/80% | Upgrade | & 713/10 I

expedition_skills.description: Empties all ammo in a deadly barrage, dealing 600% Damage.
Increases Attack of personal Aides by 50%.

on_map_skills.description: Casts a pre-battle melody that steadies the Troops' morale. Increases Troop Attack and Defense by 15%.
His silver strings ignite the Troops’ fighting spirit. Troop has a 25% chance to deal 200% Damage.
Shifts to a soothing melody that eases pain. Has 80% chance to reduce Troop Damage received by 30%.

expedition_skills.description: Fires a cannonball, dealing 180% Area Damage, then burns enemies for 30% continuous Damage and increases their Damage taken by 15% for 2 seconds.
expedition_skills.upgrade_preview: Damage Rate: 90%/108%/126%/144%/180% | Extra Damage Rate: 15%/18%/21%/24%/30% | Received Damage Increase: 3%/6%/9%/12%/15%

expedition_skills.description: Fires three consecutive cannonballs at one target, each dealing Damage by 150% of Attack and stunning for 0.5s.
Increases Attack of yourself and Aide by 10%.

on_map_skills.description: Increases Troop Defense by 15% and Health by 15%.
on_map_skills.upgrade_preview: Troop Defense Enhancement: 3%/6%/9%/12%/15% | Troop Life Enhancement: 3%/6%/9%/12%/15%

on_map_skills.description: Increases Construction Speed by 20%, reduces Resource Cost for construction by 10%.
on_map_skills.upgrade_preview: Construction Speed: 4%/8%/12%/16%/20% | Construction Resource Cost Reduction: 2%/4%/6%/8%/10%

on_map_skills.description: Artillery skills comparable to those of a divine marksman, increases Troop Damage by 25%.

expedition_skills.description: The bear rears up and strikes, dealing Area Damage equal to 280% of Attack to enemies around the target and knocking them back.
Activating an ultimate skill grants a Shield equal to 140% of Defense for 5 seconds.
Increases Attack by 15% of Defense.

on_map_skills.description: Forms a solid defense line with her loyal mount, reducing Troop Damage taken by 25%.
Increases Troop Attack by 25%.
Increases Troop Damage dealt by 25%.

expedition_skills.description: Draws two cards to strike the target, dealing 940% Damage based on their combined value. If the total is 21, Blackjack triggers and deals 1.5 times Damage.
Throws a towering Ace of Spades that drags nearby enemy inward, dealing 120% Damage.
Maintains unwavering composure in battle, increasing critical hit rate by 20%.

on_map_skills.description: Flicks a card from her sleeve and marks the deck, exposing a fatal opening in the enemy's formation. With a 10% chance to increase the enemy Troops' Damage taken by 250%.
Smiles without warmth and produces a hidden card at the perfect moment. With a 25% chance to deal Damage equal to 200%.
Shuffles formations like cards. With a 40% chance to reduces Troop Damage taken by 60%.

expedition_skills.description: Taunts all enemies and squares up like a fearless frontliner. Reduces Damage taken by 90% for 2 seconds.
Draws fast and fires 4 rapid shots into the fray. Deals 170% Damage and knocks back enemies around the target.
After using Skill "Quad Shot", locks onto the same target, leaving no room to escape. Increases Damage dealt to the targeted enemy by 12% for 3 seconds.

on_map_skills.description: Draws with a calm, deadly focus, throwing the enemy line off-balance. With a 50% chance to reduce the enemy Troops' Damage dealt by 50%.
on_map_skills.upgrade_preview: Damage Dealt by Enemy Troop Reduction: 10%/20%/30%/40%/50%

on_map_skills.description: Keeps his hat low and his resolve higher. Increases Troop Attack by 15% and Life by 15%.
on_map_skills.upgrade_preview: Troop Attack Enhancement: 3%/6%/9%/12%/15% | Troop Life Enhancement: 3%/6%/9%/12%/15%

on_map_skills.description: Pins the target with a cold-eyed mark. With a 50% chance to increase the enemy Troops' Damage taken by 50%.

expedition_skills.description: Throws dynamite in a parabolic arc, dealing Area Damage equal to 420% of Attack and stunning targets for 1.5 seconds.
Blows a smoke ring toward the ally with the lowest Health, restoring Health equal to 150% of Attack to both self and that ally.
His hand is a blur, and the air fills with gunfire before anyone else can react. At the start of battle, Attack Speed increases by 70% for 6 seconds.

on_map_skills.description: Years of chains forged a rage that never cools. With a 60% chance to increase Troop Damage dealt by 40%.
One cold stare and trigger fingers start to tremble. With a 70% chance to reduce enemy Troops' Attack by 35%.
His unyielding spirit spreads through the ranks. Increases Troop Life by 25%.

expedition_skills.description: Unloads 6 enhanced bullets in 2 seconds, each dealing 120% Damage and stunning targets for 1 second.
After every 4 Basic Attacks, fires an explosive shot dealing Area Damage equal to 120% of Attack.
Every 3 Basic Attacks, increase Attack Speed by 8%, which can stack and last until the end of battle.

on_map_skills.description: Has 80% chance to reduce Troop Damage taken by 30%, as if blessed by divine spirits.
Continuous firing, has 50% chance to increase Troop Damage by 50%.
Increases Troop Attack by 25%.

expedition_skills.description: Summons beast stampede dealing 640% Damage.
Tames a tornado, reducing Damage taken by 20% and dealing 100% continuous Damage to nearby enemies.
Increases Damage dealt by 20%.

on_map_skills.description: Lashes enemies with brutal strikes. Has 50% chance to increase Troop Damage by 50%.
Commands beasts to roar in unison, increasing Troop Attack by 25%.
Summons war beasts to surround and maul enemies. Has a 60% chance to reduce enemy Defense by 40%.
